Package org.mitre.synthea.modules

Class EncounterModule

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.engine.Module
org.mitre.synthea.modules.EncounterModule
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable
public final class EncounterModule extends Module
Module for managing patient encounters, including wellness visits, symptom-driven visits, and emergency care.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

      • Constant Field Values

    • PCP_SYMPTOM_THRESHOLD

      public static final int PCP_SYMPTOM_THRESHOLD
      These are thresholds for patients to seek symptom-driven care - they'll go to the appropriate provider based on which threshold they meet. By CDC statistics (https://www.cdc.gov/nchs/data/ahcd/namcs_summary/2015_namcs_web_tables.pdf), a person goes to an average of 24,904,00/(US adult population = 249485228) = .0998 urgent visits per year. The goal for the number of symptom-driven encounters (urgent care, PCP, and ER) is .0998 * age.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • URGENT_CARE_SYMPTOM_THRESHOLD

      public static final int URGENT_CARE_SYMPTOM_THRESHOLD
      Threshold for symptoms to trigger an urgent care visit
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • clone

      public Module clone()
      Clone the module.
      Overrides:
      clone in class Module
      Returns:
      a clone of the module

    • process

      public boolean process(Person person, long time)
      Description copied from class: Module
      Process this Module with the given Person at the specified time within the simulation. Processing will complete if the person dies.
      Overrides:
      process in class Module
      Parameters:
      person - : the person being simulated
      time - : the date within the simulated world
      Returns:
      completed : whether or not this Module completed.

    • createEncounter

      public static HealthRecord.Encounter createEncounter(Person person, long time, HealthRecord.EncounterType type, String specialty, HealthRecord.Code code, String module)
      Create an Encounter that is coded, with a provider organization, and a clinician.
      Parameters:
      person - The patient.
      time - The time of the encounter.
      type - The type of encounter (e.g. emergency).
      specialty - The clinician specialty (e.g. "General Practice")
      code - The code to assign to the encounter.
      module - The module creating this encounter.
      Returns:
      The encounter, or null if the person is already in an active encounter

    • getWellnessVisitCode

      public static HealthRecord.Code getWellnessVisitCode(Person person, long time)
      Get the correct Wellness Visit Code by age of patient.
      Parameters:
      person - The patient.
      time - The time of the encounter which we translate to age of patient.
      Returns:
      SNOMED-CT code for Wellness Visit.

    • recommendedTimeBetweenWellnessVisits

      public long recommendedTimeBetweenWellnessVisits(Person person, long time)
      Recommended time between Wellness Visits by age of patient and whether they have chronic medications.
      Parameters:
      person - The patient.
      time - The time of the encounter which we translate to age of patient.
      Returns:
      Recommended time between Wellness Visits in milliseconds

    • endEncounterModuleEncounters

      public void endEncounterModuleEncounters(Person person, long time)
      End a wellness encounter if currently active.
      Parameters:
      person - The patient.
      time - The time of the encounter end.

    • getAllCodes

      public static Collection<HealthRecord.Code> getAllCodes()
      Get all of the Codes this module uses, for inventory purposes.
      Returns:
      Collection of all codes and concepts this module uses

    • inventoryAttributes

      public static void inventoryAttributes(Map<String,Attributes.Inventory> attributes)
      Populate the given attribute map with the list of attributes that this module reads/writes with example values when appropriate.
      Parameters:
      attributes - Attribute map to populate.
